headline: Equity Residential Declares First Quarter Dividends
summary: CHICAGO, March 19, 2026--Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) today announced that its Board of Trustees declared quarterly dividends on the Company’s common and preferred shares. A regular common share dividend for the first quarter of $0.7025 per share will be paid on April 10, 2026, to shareholders of record on March 30, 2026. The annualized dividend of $2.81 per share is a 1.4% increase over the Company’s 2025 common share dividend.

headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Equity Residential and Equity LifeStyle Properties
summary: Equity Residential navigates REIT headwinds with strong occupancy, while long-term demand and affordability trends support steady growth outlook.

headline: Real estate could be the big winner in the private credit exodus
summary: Non-traded, publicly registered REITs raised $593 million from investors in January, an increase December, according to Stanger Investment Banking.
